---
description: Example command with blanket suppression
---

## Name
suppression-all:example

## Synopsis
```
/suppression-all:example
```

## Description
This command demonstrates blanket suppression of all rules.

## Implementation

<!-- skillsaw-disable -->
Try to be careful when modifying the database schema.
You should probably consider using TypeScript where possible.
Basically just make sure the code works.
<!-- skillsaw-enable -->

1. Parse the input arguments
2. Execute the main operation
3. Return the result
